purpose: Keep the local AI stack responsive without allowing optional model lanes to push macOS swap into sustained high pressure.

always_hot.reason: Primary OpenAI-compatible front door. oMLX model TTL/unload policy handles per-model residency.

warm_when_running.reason: Fallback coding lane. Stop only under critical swap pressure.

on_demand_heavy_lanes.reason: Preferred high-capability local coding lane, but not an always-resident service on the 64 GB Mac.
Manual lab lane. Keep stopped unless an explicit benchmark or Hermes tool-calling test is active.

operator_policy: Do not autostart Ornith, Rapid-MLX, or Gemma GGUF solely to keep them warm.
Keep oMLX reachable; let oMLX unload idle model weights by TTL.
When swap is high, stop Ornith and Rapid-MLX first.
When swap is critical, stop Gemma GGUF too and rely on oMLX until pressure falls.
Restart specialist lanes explicitly for benchmark or coding windows.
